MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-27-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANT HENRY MOODY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WAS HEARD. PAVEL KREPKIY, ESQ. APPEARING IN PERSON FOR PLAINTIFF. MICHAEL DODSON, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE ANY COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). HOWEVER, GIVEN THE 11/02/20 TRIAL DATE, THE COURT WILL ENTERTAIN ORAL ARGUMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/02/20 IS CONTINUED TO 03/15/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY REMAINS CLOSED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MR. DODSON TO SERVE ORDER. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL DODSON IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 66301889) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOODY, HENRY

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-15-2021 - ANNA DUBROVSKY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. MICHAEL DODSON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE ANGELA BRADSTREET IN DEPT. 624. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 624 BY 4:30 PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL AND PROVIDE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENTS OR TRIAL BRIEFS. THE COURTROOOM'S TELEPHONE NUMBER (415-551-3735) WAS ALSO GIVEN TO THE PARTIES. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON APR-28-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 AND PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
